title: Multi-column grouping broken for Python aggregates
poc: CREATE TABLE attrs(subject STRING, attribute STRING, value STRING);
INSERT INTO attrs VALUES ('_:house/903965','description','Dit verzorgde 4-KAMERAPPARTEMENT is gelegen op ...');
key_bug_features: Multi-column grouping with Python aggregates fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE attrs(subject STRING, attribute STRING, value STRING, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT subject, attribute, pycount(value) as value FROM attrs WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY subject, attribute;
